narrative:
Precinct Hiram Twp A (precinct in Portage County) has 909 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
